name: Pasta with Green Peas, Basil, and Scallions
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Fresh or frozen green peas
1/2 cup Chopped fresh scallions, including tender green parts
2 tablespoons Finely chopped fresh basil, or 1 teaspoon dried basil
recipeInstructions:
1. If using fresh peas, parboil and drain. If using frozen, boil to thaw and drain.
2. Heat the butter in a large skillet and add the vermouth and scallions. Cook for about 10 minutes until the scallions turn soft and the vermouth thickens and deglazes the pan.
3. Add the peas and basil. Turn the heat to high for 2 minutes, then pour immediately over pasta. Toss well and serve.
